title: Welfare Check
description: Caller cannot reach elderly parent and found door open.

chunks.speaker: caller
chunks.text: My mother isn't answering and her front door is open.

chunks.speaker: dispatcher
chunks.text: When was the last time you spoke with her?

chunks.speaker: caller
chunks.text: Yesterday evening. She always answers by morning.

chunks.speaker: dispatcher
chunks.text: Do you see signs of injury or forced entry?

chunks.speaker: caller
chunks.text: I can't tell from outside, I'm afraid to go in.
